LanguageData.TITAN_PrototypeHibernation.label: Forced Hibernation
LanguageData.TITAN_PrototypeHibernation.description: Prototype #0 has suffered fatal damage. Self-preservation protocol has activated forced hibernation. Status: - Forced hibernation (cannot be woken) - Rapid self-repair - Immune to most damage - Auto-awakening in 60 seconds
